profile.name: My Finances
profile._comment: Personal finances profile — sample data. Replace with your own. All amounts are numbers (no $ or commas).

holdings._comment: accounts[] = cash on hand per account. compare[] = obligations to measure cash against; set urgent:true for the eviction-risk / must-pay-now one (renders red).
holdings.note: 🔴 The urgent bar (red) is what protects the essentials — pay that first. Set urgent:true on it in data.json.

loans.name: Friend — Alex
loans.note: Helped with a vet bill. Flexible — pay back when able.

loans.name: Angel investor
loans.note: Loan structured as an investment — part of payback is a revenue %. Counted separately from near-term personal debt so the 'still owed' total isn't inflated.
